title: The Healing Camp
subtitle: Seaside camping & mindful dining
description: A seaside camp where nature sets the rhythm. Wake to ocean sounds, dine on mindful meals, and let the island pace slow you down. The Healing Camp is not a resort — it's a place to rest, reconnect, and breathe.

title: Lan Ha Floating Homestay
subtitle: Sleep on the bay
description: An uncommon stay on the water. Our floating homestay sits quietly in Lan Ha Bay — surrounded by karst mountains, far from noise, close to everything that matters. Fish, kayak, cook, rest.
